tile_layout.notes: Stairs up to 5F at (0,0) and (12,0). Stairs down to 3F at (9,0) and (17,0). Production sign at (7,0). Studio 2 sign at (15,0). Fisher at (6,4) faces up (post-Rocket). DJ Mary at (14,6) spins random slow. Meowth at (12,7). Executive Proton at (14,1) faces left (Rocket takeover). Grunt M10 at (5,6) spins clockwise (Rocket takeover). Grunt F4 at (12,4) faces right (Rocket takeover). Scientist Rich at (4,2) faces left (Rocket takeover).

npcs.name: Fisher
npcs.dialogue_summary: I listened to the radio while I was at the RUINS. I heard a strange broadcast there.

npcs.name: DJ Mary
npcs.dialogue_summary_during_rockets: MARY: Why? Why do I have to suffer through this? MEOWTH, help me!
npcs.dialogue_summary_just_cleared: MARY: Oh! You're my little savior! Will you take this as my thanks? (gives PINK BOW)
npcs.dialogue_summary_got_pink_bow: MARY: It's just right for Pokemon that know Normal-type moves.
npcs.dialogue_summary_after: MARY: Please tune into me on PROF. OAK'S Pokemon TALK show.

npcs.name: Meowth
npcs.note: Sprite is SPRITE_GROWLITHE in the source but represents DJ Mary's Meowth companion

trainers.name: Grunt
trainers.seen_text: You plan to rescue the DIRECTOR? That won't be possible because I'm going to beat you!
trainers.after_battle_text: I don't believe it! I was beaten!

trainers.name: Executive Proton
trainers.seen_text: Stop! I'm known as the TEAM ROCKET fortress! You're not taking another step!
trainers.after_battle_text: You've earned my respect, so here's some advice. It's not too late. You can still turn back.
trainers.note: Executive Proton is the second Rocket Executive encountered. Guards the route to 5F.

trainers.name: Grunt
trainers.seen_text: Don't I think Pokemon are cute? I'll think my Pokemon are cute -- after they beat yours!
trainers.after_battle_text: I love my beautiful self! Who cares about Pokemon?

trainers.name: Rich
trainers.seen_text: Most excellent. This RADIO TOWER will fulfill our grand design.
trainers.beaten_text: Hmmm... All grand plans come with snags.
trainers.after_battle_text: Do you honestly believe you can stop TEAM ROCKET?

events.description: Executive Proton appears at (14,1) guarding the left staircase to 5F. Grunt M10, Grunt F4, and Scientist Rich fill the floor. DJ Mary is trapped and distressed. Fisher civilian is hidden.
All Rockets gone. DJ Mary rewards player with Pink Bow on first post-clear visit (EVENT_GOT_PINK_BOW_FROM_MARY). Fisher civilian returns.

dj_mary_pink_bow.description: After Rockets are cleared, DJ Mary gives the Pink Bow as thanks. Item boosts Normal-type moves when held by a Pokemon.

executive_proton.role: Team Rocket Executive (2nd encountered in Radio Tower arc)
executive_proton.post_battle: Gives grudging respect, warns player they can still turn back
executive_proton.team_note: Single Golbat at level 36 with offensive moves — Leech Life, Bite, Confuse Ray, Wing Attack

floor_purpose: Production — DJ Mary's studio, Executive Proton boss fight
notes: 4F is the Production floor with two broadcast studios. It has four staircases: two going up to 5F (at x=0 and x=12) and two going down to 3F (at x=9 and x=17). DJ Mary is always present; during the Rocket takeover she is distressed and trapped, but after the tower is cleared she rewards the player with the Pink Bow held item. A Meowth (DJ Mary's companion) wanders near her studio area. During the Rocket takeover, four enemy trainers are stationed across the floor including Executive Proton (the named Rocket Executive) who blocks the left staircase with a level 36 Golbat. Scientist Rich near the right side has a Porygon with special moves.
